data.description: JPMORGAN: FED TO CUT 25BPS NEXT WEEK JPMorgan’s Michael Feroli expects the Fed to lower rates by 25bps next week to 4.0–4.25%. He sees two or three dissents favoring a bigger cut, but none for holding steady. The dot plot should still show one more cut beyond 2025.

data.title: Europe Smart Parking market projected to reach $12.88 billion by 2033 from $2.48 billion in 2024, CAGR of 20.11% from 2025 to 2033.
data.description: A report titled "Europe Smart Parking Market Analysis: Trends, Growth Drivers, and Future Outlook" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Europe Smart Parking Market is projected to grow significantly, with an expected value of US$12.88 billion by 2033, up from US$2.48 billion in 2024. This growth signifies a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 20.11% between 2025 and 2033. Europe's commitment to establishing sustainable urban infrastructure is evident through increased investments in smart city initiatives and intelligent transportation systems.

data.title: Inverness Graham-backed Treat Planet buys Bosco & Roxy’s, extending leadership in premium pet treats.
data.description: Philadelphia-based investment firm Inverness Graham revealed the acquisition of Bosco & Roxy’s by its pet treat platform, Treat Planet. Bosco & Roxy’s, situated in London, Ontario, is known for producing premium intricately decorated baked dog treats for various occasions (Christmas, Halloween, etc.). This acquisition expands Treat Planet’s offerings and strengthens its position in the pet treat market. Inverness Graham, focusing on tech-driven companies, aims to enhance Treat Planet's success through strategic acquisitions like Bosco & Roxy’s.

US Corn Ending Stocks for September Are at 2.110 Billion Bushels, Slightly Above Estimates but Down from Last Month. Soybean Stocks Are at 300 Million Bushels, Slightly Higher Than Estimates and Last Month. Total Wheat Stocks Remain at 844 Million, Slightly Below Estimates.

data.title: F.D.A. examines Covid vaccine deaths, including cases of children and birth defects. Info to be presented at C.D.C. meeting.
data.description: The organization intends to report on cases of children's deaths and birth defects to a pivotal C.D.C. panel meeting scheduled for the upcoming week.

data.title: Middlesex Water Co. set to appear at Janney’s 5th Annual Virtual Water Utilities Conference.
data.description: In the latest update on the economy, it has been reported that the GDP growth rate for the last quarter was 6.2%, exceeding expectations set by analysts. This growth marks a significant increase from the previous quarter and has been attributed to strong performance in sectors such as manufacturing and technology. Additionally, the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.1%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. These positive indicators have led to a surge in investor confidence, with the stock market hitting record highs. Experts predict that this trend of growth is likely to continue in the coming months, providing a boost to the overall economic outlook.

data.title: Ualett renews partnership with Las Vegas Lights FC for Hispanic Heritage Month, highlighting gig workers' role.
data.description: Tomorrow, Ualett, the bilingual financial platform designed for gig workers, will be extending its partnership with Las Vegas Lights FC during a special Hispanic Heritage Night event in Las Vegas. The celebration will coincide with the Lights’ upcoming home game against Miami FC. This event aims to recognize the cultural significance and contributions of Hispanic communities, shedding light on the essential contribution of gig workers to the Las Vegas economy. As this event occurs at the onset of Hispanic Heritage Month, it serves as a reflective tribute to Ualett's commitment to supporting diversity and the gig economy in Las Vegas.

data.title: Global video streaming market to grow from US$131.44B in 2024 to US$599.20B by 2033, at a CAGR of 18.36% due to rising demand for on-demand content and growth in OTT platforms.
data.description: A report on Platform Trends & Forecast for the Video Streaming Market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Global Video Streaming Market is expected to increase from US$131.44 billion in 2024 to US$599.20 billion by 2033, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.36% between 2025 and 2033. This growth is attributed to rising on-demand content consumption, expanding smartphone and internet usage, and the surge in Over-the-Top (OTT) platforms, supported by advancements in Artificial Intelligence (AI).

data.title: Steelcase Inc. (NYSE: SCS) to webcast Q2 FY26 financial results discussion on Sept 25, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. News release on Sept 24, 2025.
data.description: In Grand Rapids, Michigan, on September 12, 2025, Steelcase Inc. (NYSE: SCS) announced that a webcast will be held to discuss its second quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results on Thursday, September 25, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The webcast link will be accessible at http://ir.steelcase.com, with a replay available shortly after the call ends. The detailed financial results news release will be published on September 24, 2025, after the market closes.

data.description: In Broken Arrow, Oklahoma on September 12, 2025, Kinetic, a top residential and business fiber internet services provider, hosted a week-long "Kinetic Commitment to Community" event. Employees from various locations came together to participate in this event.

data.title: Luxury estate in Mill Valley, CA up for auction on Sep 29, known for its walkable community and family-friendly setting.
data.description: A luxurious estate located in the forest-framed Mill Valley, California, will be up for auction on September 29th. This property offers upscale living in a family-friendly neighborhood that is easily accessible by foot.

data.title: Legal battle over "The Pitt" as possible spinoff of "ER," claims Michael Crichton's estate.
data.description: A legal dispute has arisen between the estate of a renowned author, known for creating the popular "ER" series, and the creators of a new successful television show. The conflict pertains to the resemblance of the new show to a stealth reboot of the original "ER" series. The estate, holding intellectual property rights to "ER," is disputing the similarities between the two shows. The case involves intricate legal arguments surrounding the alleged stealth reboot, leaving both parties embroiled in a fierce legal battle. The dispute has garnered attention due to the substantial financial stakes involved, with potential implications for future profits and creative rights.

data.title: Virbac reports 2025 half-year results with ¹change at constant exchange rates, focusing on organic sales growth and scope impacts, including acquisitions like Sasaeah company.
data.description: The change in sales without factoring in exchange rate differences and changes in scope is referred to as organic sales growth. This calculation involves comparing the current and prior periods using the same exchange rates to exclude currency fluctuations. Additionally, any notable changes in the scope are accounted for by evaluating the current period based on the prior period's consolidation scope. The calculations are based on the actual scope, which also includes the impact of acquisitions such as the Sasaeah company. For these acquisitions, the relevant data is assessed using the prior period's exchange rate.

data.title: Ex-Trump adviser Bo Hines named CEO of Tether's USAT stablecoin, a US-regulated, dollar-backed project. Joined in April.
data.description: The ex-White House cryptocurrency advisor, who recently joined Tether in April, is set to take over as the CEO of its upcoming "US-approved, dollar-supported stablecoin."

data.title: Oncotelic Therapeutics highlights 2 years of progress with its late-stage pipeline, showcasing clinical and regulatory advancements.
data.description: In Agoura Hills, California, on September 12, 2025, Oncotelic Therapeutics, Inc. (OTCQB: OTLC), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focusing on innovative oncology and immunotherapy treatments, shared key achievements from the last two years. The company highlighted significant advancements in clinical development and regulatory recognition for its primary drug candidates.
